## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🔄 Refactor / code quality
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update
- [ ] 🔧 CI/CD change
- [ ] 📝 Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] TypeScript type-check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] ESLint passes (`npx eslint "src/**/*.{ts,tsx}"`)
- [ ] Jest tests pass (`npx jest`)
- [ ] Model inference still works (manual test on device or simulator)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or private data
- [ ] Proguard rules updated if new native dependencies added
